title: AdditionalEPDData
description:
AdditionalEPDData: A data fragment containing other optional information regarding the production and documentation of any Environmental Product Declaration. 
Use AddFragment() to combine this information with any EPD for continuous integration.

Description.description: Brief summary of the EPD from the data source.

EndOfLifeTreatment.description: Description of the material's treatment after its useful life.

Id.description: Unique identifier of the EPD from the source of the information.

IndustryStandards.description: Industry Standards referenced in creating the product.

Jurisdiction.description: Jurisdiction within which the sector based product EPD originates.

LifeSpan.description: The period of useful life of the product measured in years.

Manufacturer.description: Manufacturer name responsible for the product being documented.

PlantName.description: Manufacturing facility name within which the product was created.

PostalCode.description: Postal Code within which the product was created.

Publisher.description: Publisher responsible for recording and presenting all EPD information.

ReferenceYear.description: Year in which the EPD was created. Default set to the current year, please override if creating an EPD from legacy information.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
